home.descricao1: Full Stack developer focused on creating [green]modern, fast[/green] and [green]scalable[/green] applications.

about.primeiroParagrafo: My name is Lukas, I'm 24 years old and I'm a student of [green]Systems Analysis and Development[/green], focusing on [green]Full Stack[/green] development.
about.segundoParagrafo: I have experience developing web and mobile applications using [green]HTML[/green], [green]CSS[/green], [green]JavaScript[/green], [green]Node.js[/green], [green]React[/green], [green]React Native[/green], and [green]MongoDB.[/green]
about.terceiroParagrafo: I strive to create modern, responsive, and efficient applications, always prioritizing performance, user experience, and best development practices.
about.const: Creating solutions that impact people and businesses.
